# ADR-NNNN — <short title>

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted (v1) | Reserved seam (v1) | Deferred (v2+) | Rejected | Superseded by ADR-XXXX
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What forces are at play? What makes this decision necessary now? Keep it factual;
link related ADRs with `ADR-XXXX` and reference `ARCHITECTURE.md` sections.

## Decision

State the decision decisively, in the active voice. If a proposal was rejected or
narrowed, say exactly what was rejected and the chosen alternative.

## Consequences

- **+** benefits / what becomes easier
- **−** costs / what becomes harder
- follow-ups or new seams this introduces

## V1 / V2

What applies in v1 vs what is deferred. Use the `[NOW]/[RESERVE]/[LATER]` framing
consistent with `ARCHITECTURE.md`.
